description: Notes for drawing up a legal document? "The husband: Sahl b. Yefet. His wife: [...] bt. Maṣliaḥ. The property that is in Bilbays. The name of the cantor: Avraham b. Saʿadya (likely the Hebronite, known from other documents to have had a position of communal leadership in Bilbays).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
